name: addIntegers
spec: Return the sum of a and b.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `addIntegers(a: Integer, b: Integer) -> Integer`. Return the sum of a and b. Return only the method code.

name: isPowerOfTwo
spec: Return true only if value is a positive power of two.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `isPowerOfTwo(value: Integer) -> Boolean`. Return true only if value is a positive power of two. Return only the method code.

name: parseIntegerOrZero
spec: Return the Integer value represented by text. If text is not a valid integer, return 0.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `parseIntegerOrZero(text: String) -> Integer`. Return the Integer value represented by text. If text is not a valid integer, return 0. Return only the method code.

name: removeSpaces
spec: Return text with all space characters removed.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `removeSpaces(text: String) -> String`. Return text with all space characters removed. Return only the method code.

name: quarterOfYear
spec: Return the quarter number 1 through 4 for the given month 1 through 12.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `quarterOfYear(month: Integer) -> Integer`. Return the quarter number 1 through 4 for the given month 1 through 12. Return only the method code.

name: sumIntegerArray
spec: Return the sum of all integers in values. Return 0 for an empty array.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `sumIntegerArray(values: IntegerArray) -> Integer`. Return the sum of all integers in values. Return 0 for an empty array. Return only the method code.
